subject: Ecosystem Intel: Indian Funding & AgriTech Expansion (March 2026)
aiIntro: Ecosystem Intelligence Update: This report delivers a high-level briefing on the entire Indian Funding and AgriTech Ecosystem for March 2026. The month recorded a significant net expansion in ecosystem support, with six new programs or initiatives commencing operations, balanced by one program concluding its operational phase. Activity spanned diverse areas, including foundational incubation, seed funding, deep science innovation, and specialized AgriTech accelerators. Public and private sector collaborations continued to drive momentum, focusing on areas from assistive technology and social entrepreneurship to clean energy and value-added agricultural processing. The sustained commitment to fostering innovation across the agricultural value chain and broader start-up landscape remains a defining characteristic.
opportunities: STPI Next Generation Incubation Scheme (NGIS) / LEAP Ahead
India Australia RISE Accelerator (Round 4: Alumni Scale-up)
SISFS Incubator Grant (To act as Seed Fund partner)
